summary: Sealed producers round 2: R5 theory-path grammar + R2 proof-script west pane assembly (Fable), then both-sides audit

result.impl:
ROUND 2 COMPLETE â€” R5 (theory-path grammar) + R2 (proof-script west pane) both implemented, gated, and documented. All servers stopped (3131/3132/3133; full 3100-3199 scan clean). No git commits; nothing outside /home/kamilner/tamarin-cleanroom/weblayer/ modified.

R5 â€” theory-path grammar (/home/kamilner/tamarin-cleanroom/weblayer/producers/workspace/producers-clean/src/path.rs)
- Render side from the full corpus href harvest (923,498 URLs, own tool tools/harvest_hrefs.py): segment bytes are [A-Za-z0-9_.] raw plus exactly one escape pair ever â€” add/%3Cfirst%3E (uppercase hex). main/lemma never appears in any href.
- Parse side from live batteries against own-authored theories (PathProbe, EncProbe2): split on raw '/' THEN percent-decode per segment (%2F does not split; invalid %-sequences stay literal; UTF-8 with U+FFFD replacement; '+' not a space); heads exact and case-sensitive; extra segments after a complete match ignored; empty names parse; lemma existence is resolution, not parse.
- The numeric cases-segments are a Haskell-reads-shaped integer prefix: accepts 0x/0o/0b any case, parens, "- 1", trailing junk (1abc, 1_, (1)x); rejects +1, floats (1.0, 1e2), and the underscore-prefix quirk _1 (lexes as identifier). The two index values are byte-inert (bodies identical for 0/0 vs 9/9 vs -1/0) â€” source-vs-case mapping recorded UNOBSERVABLE. Hoped-for arbitrary-byte encoding channel via metachar filename COLLAPSED (download/get_and_append URLs derive from the theory name) â€” encoding beyond %3C/%3E recorded UNOBSERVABLE with documented RFC3986-unreserved choice.
- Tests: live acceptance replay (68 accept + 27 reject probes), decode-echo fixtures, parseâ‡„render round-trip, and a corpus sweep round-tripping all 40,037 distinct main/* href tails byte-identically (497 method/ tails asserted out-of-vocabulary per the interface enum).

R2 â€” west pane assembly (src/proofscript.rs, links constructed through R5, skin through R1's postprocess)
- Corpus is 478 overview panes (82 help + 396 proof; SPEC's 473 undercounts by 5). Frame: lines + final space; 5 fixed nav items; add-first; per-lemma decl/edit-or-delete/proof/add; two blanks before end when lemma-less; proved headers wrapped in one status span (hl_good x3192, hl_bad x146), incomplete proofs unwrapped; proof lines opaque R2 input (R3 later).
- Key discovery: the quantifier/formula inline-vs-vertical layout is decided on ESCAPED width (entities at escaped length; visible chars/bytes provably do not separate â€” minimal corpus pair at 55 visible), and a live 35-lemma bisection theory (WProbe, 4 formula families) pinned the boundary to exactly <=69 inline / >=70 vertical, chars not bytes.
- Acceptance: corpus_sweep_all_overview_panes = 478/478 slice-and-re-render byte-identity with every frame byte asserted during strict inversion; live replays 3/3 on never-captured theories (PathProbe fresh, WProbe, PathProbe v2 after a live autoprove = proved hl_good tree). Mutation checks all observed to fail then rever
result.audit:
Producers Round 2 audit complete. Appended a full both-sides section to `/home/kamilner/tamarin-cleanroom/weblayer/AUDIT.md` (now 1329 lines; ends `VERDICT: pass`).

Summary of what I verified in the round-2 delta (R5 `path.rs` + R2 `proofscript.rs`, against upstream `Types.hs` `parseTheoryPath`/`renderTheoryPath` and `Theory.hs` `theoryIndex`/`lemmaIndex`/`proofIndex`):

- Every grammar rule (Â§11) and pane-assembly rule (Â§12â€“Â§13) in BEHAVIOR.md traces to a logged probe/capture â€” mapped each to [S14]â€“[S18]/[L08]â€“[L15]. The five tools read only captured OUTPUT or drive the live oracle over curl; none reads a source tree. Re-ran the suite: 24 tests green.
- MERGER (byte-forced, correctly reproduced): the R5 URL-token grammar (pinned by [S14]/[L08]â€“[L13] + the 40037-tail round-trip) and the R2 west-pane frame (pinned by the 478/478 slice-and-re-render sweep).
- Affirmative non-copying: the numeric grammar reconstructs GHC-`reads` behavior from the [L10] battery (upstream has no such code â€” it calls Prelude `safeRead`, so there is no tamarin expression to copy); `prefixWithUnderscore`/`unprefixUnderscore` pointedly absent; `ThyPath` coarser than `TheoryPath` (omits `Method`); R2 holds nav vocabulary/formula/rules-label opaque where upstream computes them; layout is a probe-bisected `â‰¤69` escaped-width special-case over a flat `Vec<String>` rather than HughesPJ `nest 2 (sep â€¦)`. Zero identifier-constellation overlap, no comment lineage.
- Tests are live byte gates (strict inversion asserting every frame byte + the inline/vertical width witness; three documented mutation checks that fail-then-revert).

PH-1 confirmed resolved: SPEC.md/README.md now cite only ported `.rs` seams (`theory_html.rs`/`proof_tree.rs`/`root.rs`/`path_parse.rs`) plus pseudonymous usernames, matching the sibling-SPEC norm; a full sealed-readable scan (scaffold + workspace + round-2 files) finds zero `src/Web/*.hs` / `Text/PrettyPrint/Html.hs` paths, and nothing in the delta re-introduced a citation.

Three non-blocking notes (not findings, no redo): continued shipped-comment provenance narration plus two stale refs in `proofscript.rs` ("473"â†’478; "Â§11"â†’Â§12); render-side `prefixWithUnderscore` omission (latent fidelity edge for `_`-prefixed lemma names, but affirmatively non-copying and corpus-unobservable); and `-`/`~` kept raw in `encode_segment` beyond the observed `[A-Za-z0-9_.]` set (scenes-Ă -faire, honestly flagged UNOBSERVABLE).

VERDICT: pass
